zh.Droitwich, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾德洛特維其
zh.Worchestershire, England: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當John DeWinter於1375年出生在英國武斯特斯爾德洛特維其時，他的父親William DeWinter25歲，母親Elizabeth Appleby25歲。他於1392年與Agnes Martin在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1442年4月14日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John DeWinter于1375年出生在英国武斯特斯爾德洛特維其时，他的父亲William DeWinter25岁，母亲Elizabeth Appleby25岁。他于1392年与Agnes Martin在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1442年4月14日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: DeWinter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Tovah.  German Bernhard.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): possibly an ornamentalextension of   Levy  .

variants.name: Levy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Moshe, Emanuel, Avi, Shlomo, Isadore, Meir, Nissim, Ofer.

Jewish (Ashkenazic and Sephardic): from the Biblical personal name Levi, from a Hebrew word meaning ‘joining’. This was borne by a son of Jacob and Leah (Genesis 29: 34). Bearers of this name are Levites, members of the tribe of Levi, who form a hereditary caste who assist the kohanim (see Cohen ) in their priestly duties. Compare Levi and Lowy 1.
Czech (Levý): nickname for a left-handed person, from the adjective levý ‘left’. This surname is also found in Slovakia.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John DeWinter was born in 1375, in Droitwich, Worcestershire, England, his father, William DeWinter, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Appleby, was 25. He married Agnes Martin in 1392, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 14 April 1442, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John DeWinter est né en 1375, à Droitwich, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, William DeWinter, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Appleby, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Martin en 1392, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1442, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John DeWinter 1375 in Droitwich, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William DeWinter 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Appleby 25. Er hat 1392 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Martin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 14. April 1442 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John DeWinter è nato il nel 1375 nel Droitwich, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, William DeWinter, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Appleby, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Martin nel 1392, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 14 aprile 1442, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John DeWinterが1375年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドロイトウィチで生まれた時，父William DeWinterは25歳，母Elizabeth Applebyは25歳であった。1392年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでAgnes Martinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1442年4月14日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John DeWinter(이)가 1375년 영국 워스스터실르 드로이트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William DeWinter(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Appleby(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Agnes Martin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1442년 4월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John DeWinter nasceu em 1375, em Droitwich, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William DeWinter, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Appleby, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Martin em 1392, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1442, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John DeWinter родился в 1375 г. в местности дроитвич, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William DeWinter было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Appleby, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Martin в 1392 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 14 апреля 1442 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John DeWinter nació en 1375, en Droitwich, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William DeWinter, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Appleby, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Agnes Martin en 1392, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 14 de abril de 1442, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
